Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-08-291426 The Hope Trust, PTR-09-292835 The DAF Trust and PTR-09-292386 The Donald Alexander Flynn Trust.

Appearances: John Hartog (Guardian Ad Litem) in Propria Persona. Amy McEvoy appeared by telephone for Mali Flynn.

Mr. Hartog provided background, explained reasons for the modifications and addressed issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petitions for Orders Approving Modifications of Trust, etc. and the Petitions for Discharge or Guardian Ad Litem in all three matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Report Of Guardian Ad Litem On All Actions Taken To Implement The Terms Of The Settlement Agreement And The Results Of Those Actions
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-08-291426 The Hope Trust; PTR-09-292385 The DAF Trust; PTR-09-292386 The Flynn Trust.

Appearances: John Hartog (Guardian Ad Litem) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Hartog reported that World Wrap has been disposed of (transaction consumated) to the Former CFO (Mr. Richardson) of Flynn Industries, that the letter of intent to purchase the parking lot has been withdrawn, that the parking lot is still listed but that there is no interest, and that the parking lot provides a source of income of $4,100.00 per month. Mr. Hartog also stated that the amendments to the Trust have been prepared and reviewed by all Parties, that he expects a petition to filed within the next two or three weeks, and that he will petition for discharge and request fees. Mr. Hartog also spoke of the relationship of Alex and Mali, and the Burger King sales. The status hearings were continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a Petition for Modification of Trust and a Petition for Discharge of the Guardian Ad Litem.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Accounting And Report Of Trust Administration; Breach Of Duty Of Loyalty Breach Of Duty To Make Trust Property Productive; Breach Of Duty To Administer The Trust With Reasonable Care; For Surcharge Of Podesta; For Podesta To Pay Petitioners Legal Fees; For Order Denying Podestats Attorneys Fees From Being Paid From The Trust, Fii Or Fv; And Removal For All Purposes Of Elliot Steinberg As Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Continued To Sep-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case numbers 292385 The DAF Trust and 292386 The Flynn Trust.

Appearances: Shirley Kovar for Mali Flynn. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Robert Downey. David Baer for the Guardian Ad Litem.

The Court stated that the accounting petition on the Hope Trust was put on hold due to the pending appeal and continued it to September 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. In addition, the Court stated that it was prepared to sign the stipulated order appointing Mr. Hartog as the Guardian Ad Litem, that the accounting petition on the DAF Trust filed by Mali Flynn was taken off calendar on August 19, 2009 and therefore, the petition to do with the appointment was also taken off calendar, that it was waiting for the dismissal and that it would not sign any orders appointing Mr. Hartog until it received resignation by Mr. Steinberg in the Flynn and the DAF matters. Ms. Kovar stated that she would file the dismissal on the accounting petition but that she gave no authority to take the appointment of Guardian Ad Litem off calendar. The Court also directed Mr. Baer to submit separate orders for the two separate petitions by the end of the week. The 12th cause of action in the Flynn matter was overruled with 10 days leave to respond and the accounting petition was continued to April 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the amended account.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Petition For Accounting, Etc., Under The Anti-Slapp Statute
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Denied

Demurrer To Petition For Accounting Etc., And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Elliot Steinberg. Andrew Zabronsky for Robert Podesta and Paul Downey. Shirley Kovar and Edgar Hayden for Mali Flynn (Beneficiary/Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The tentative stands as to the 1st cause of action through the 7th cause of action as follows: 1st cause of action; duty to report and account; sustain with 10 days leave to amend; 2nd cause of action; duty of loyalty; sustain with 10 days leave to amend; 3rd cause of action; duty to make trust property productive; sustain with 10 days leave to amended; 4th cause of action; duty to administer trust with reasonable care; overrule; 5th cause of action; surhcarge of Podesta; overrule; 6th cause of action; attorneys' fees; overrule; 7th cause of action; request for order that Podesta cannot use trust funds of Flynn Industrities or Flynn Ventures for his legal representation in this matter; overrule. The 8th cause of action; removal of Elliott Steinberg as GAL for all purposes: overrule and continued to February 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Motion to Dismiss was denied. The Anti-Slapp motion to strike was also denied.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
